content.full_text:
California
Fair Political
Practices Commission

April 27, 1992


William P. Conway, Jr.
1116 24th Street
Sacramento, CA 95816

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. A-92-217

Dear Mr. Conway:

You have requested advice on behalf of the California
Mortuary Alliance and the Interment Association of California
concerning the campaign provisions of the Political Reform Act
(the "Act").1/

This letter is to advise you that the name "California
Interment and Mortuary Political Action Committee" does comply
with the name identification requirements for a sponsored
committee under the Act. (Section 84102.)

Please feel free to call me at (916) 322-5662, Monday through
Thursday between 8:00 a.m. and 5:00 p.m., if you have any
additional questions regarding this matter.

Sincerely,


Scott Hallabrin
Acting General Counsel

[signature]
By: Alice Hughes
Political Reform Consultant




1/ Government Code Sections 81000-91015. All statutory
references are to the Government Code unless otherwise indicated.
Commission regulations appear at 2 California Code of Regulations
Section 18000, et seq. All references to regulations are to Title
2, Division 6 of the California Code of Regulations.


428 J Street, Suite 800 • P.O. Box 587 • Sacramento CA 95814-0587 • (916) 322-5660

CONCLUSION: This letter is to advise you that the name "California Interment and Mortuary Political Action Committee" does comply with the name identification requirements for a sponsored committee under the Act. (Section 84102.)
